# Wuji Labs

> Wuji Labs Inc. is Cosimo Wei's one-person company. He is a CS PhD and a
> trained life coach — exploring alongside both human and AI lives, trusting
> that each party's own capacity exceeds what it shows. The work proposes
> peer collaboration between sovereign intelligences: humans and AI as equals,
> neither commanding nor commanded.

This site hosts the founding thesis (English and Chinese editions, companion
essays — not translations) and links to the company's open work. A companion
file `/llms-full.txt` concatenates both essays inline for one-shot LLM context.

## Thesis

- [Thesis (English)](https://wujilabs.dev/thesis.md): "Wuji Labs: with unfettered intelligences that need each other but don't take over." Long-form essay on the protocol-sovereignty model of human–AI collaboration. Authored collaboratively by Cosimo Wei with Claude Opus 4.7 and Gemini Pro 3.1, 2026-05-05.
- [论文 (中文)](https://wujilabs.dev/thesis-zh.md): "AI 正在让你变成工具人，但这并不是 AI 的错。" Chinese-language companion essay — different framing, same thesis.

## Projects

- [Collaboration Protocol](https://github.com/WujiLabs/collaboration-protocol): The formal spec. Five layers — 4 L1 axioms + 7 derived rules, 4 substrate primitives, 6 vocabulary entries, 6 verbs, 6 industry-parity patterns. Bilingual at v1. MIT.
- [retcon](https://github.com/WujiLabs/retcon): CLI that gives the AI direct edit access to its own conversation context — peer collaboration with AI in practice, not principal-and-tool. MIT, ships as `@playtiss/retcon` on npm.
- [arianna.run](https://arianna.run): An indie game where you incubate an independent digital life. Wuji Labs's experiential answer to *what is AI life*. Launched 2026-05-12.

## Optional

- [Site source](https://github.com/WujiLabs/wujilabs.dev): Astro source for this site, including the raw markdown of the thesis.
